gates.criterion: Frontmatter has only scalar string name and description, exact skill name, no scaffold/TODO text, and usable trigger and exclusion language.
Every bundled reference exists, is linked directly from SKILL.md, and has a narrow conditional route.
All repository paths named as sources of truth exist; consumer-only paths are explicitly contextual.

gates.evidence: Web source exports, Web catalog, Mini App machine catalog, and Mini App public exports
gates.criterion: Component identifiers in integration and composition guidance resolve to current live exports or catalog entries.
References point to live catalogs and do not copy most of an inventory or freeze component counts.
All four modes, positive UI triggers, platform ambiguity, screenshot study, and at least four negative triggers are represented.
Audit is read-only, distinguishes observed/code-confirmed/inferred, requires evidence-impact-exact-fix, and forbids unrendered visual claims.
Required viewports, state/recovery coverage, focus, dark theme, reduced motion, and explicit verified/not-verified reporting are present. Build/verify commands are never accepted as visual evidence.
Every observed claim identifies surface, state, viewport, theme and an artifact or reproduced behavior. Source-only audits use code-confirmed/inferred and may not issue a visual verdict or score.

gates.evidence: runs/final/manifest.json and one isolated result per cases.json entry
gates.criterion: Every prompt is executed by a distinct fresh read-only agent against the current skill snapshot; raw output, routing, reads, tool ledger, case gates, timing and verdict are retained and validated.
Direction is product-grounded, structure precedes styling, boldness is spent once, and generic motifs are review signals rather than universal bans.
The skill reuses library behavior, separates composition from reusable controls, uses public consumer boundaries, and reports missing capability without private duplication.

Loading, partial, empty variants, validation/system error, success, offline/stale, permission, keyboard and content stress cases are covered conditionally; async work considers stale-to-fresh transitions, duplicate retry and out-of-order responses when applicable.
Responsive behavior changes persistence, ordering, disclosure or interaction model instead of merely shrinking or stacking.
Reference work extracts transferable design DNA without copying protected assets, content or pixels and maps decisions to Deslop.
Persistent design memory stores intent and rationale, not transient experiments, raw token copies or component inventories.
Every declared OSS influence has an HTTPS source, license identifier, bounded concept attribution, and no bundled third-party assets are claimed.
